creator: ruben@verweg.com
text:
Created attachment 146188
patch that introduces allow.mount.fdescfs

FreeBSD has hierarchical jail support since r192895. However, not being able to mount all required filesystems makes it somewhat less useful as some software (bash, java) requires fdescfs being mounted on /dev/fd

This patch introduces the jail parameter allow.mount.fdescfs. Tested on r268794

Possible caveat is that PR_ALLOW_ALL went from 0x0fff to 0xffff and only space for three more options to pr_allow. The flags field still remains a word and should imho not introduce a ABI change.
